synopsis: Half of the Jedi Council has been sent to the world of Malastare - one of the last worlds to hold Podraces - to negotiate a peace treaty between two warring factions. But the whole affair is being manipulated by a secret, third party, out to assassinate the Jedi! This story arc features many familiar characters from The Phantom Menace. Witness the ongoing adventures that bridge the gap between Episodes I & II!
title: Republic #14: Emissaries to Malastare, Part 2
